content.en:
"Eternal and Imperishable Eucharist!!"

Countless Domain Ancestors were dumbfounded.

Because, this is the first holy body in the dark sanctuary, and no holy body can compete with the eternal immortal holy body!

The Eternal Immortal Holy Body is composed of three holy bodies, and it is also possible to directly cultivate the Eternal Immortal Holy Body, but no one in the Dark Sanctuary has been cultivating the Eternal Immortal Holy Body for a long time, because its cultivation requirements are too high, and anyone who dares to cultivate the Eternal Immortal Holy Body, since the extinction of the corresponding Holy Body treasures, one has died in cultivation, and no one can practice it anymore.

But now, Ye Tian has practiced!

"It's so wicked!"

Many people exclaimed.

Before, they learned that the Battle Gate had accepted a Holy Son who had cultivated into a Mixed Yuan Holy Body, but the gap between the Mixed Yuan Holy Body and the Eternal Immortal Holy Body was still very large.

Cultivating the Mixed Yuan Holy Body does not mean that you can practice the Eternal Immortal Holy Body, you also need to practice the Black Yuan Holy Body and the Forbidden Heaven Holy Body to be able to form the Eternal Immortal Holy Body, and if any kind of Holy Body cultivation fails, that is death.

"You have cultivated the Eternal Immortal Holy Body!"

Yongyuan Holy Son was a little surprised.

Still, he had no fear.

Unless Ye Tian also mastered multiple consummation-level domain techniques, there was no way to defeat him.

Immediately, the Yongyuan Holy Son also stimulated the power of the Holy Body and the Extreme Dao, and a Gate Domain Technique was casually displayed, and he fought with Ye Tian.

Thundered!!!!

Ye Tian kept retreating, completely suppressed.

Even though Ye Tian possessed the Eternal Immortal Holy Body, and the Holy Body suppressed the Holy Body of the Eternal Yuan Holy Son, his Forbidden Dao Technique was far less powerful than the other party's Perfection Domain Technique.

"Don't you have a domain technique? Hahaha!! you think you can defeat me by relying on the Eternal Immortal Holy Body without mastering the domain technique? Are you too naïve! Today, I can defeat a demon of the Eternal Immortal Holy Body, which is enough to boast!"

Yongyuan Holy Son laughed.

"Defeat!"

"Domain Technique: Yongyuan Holy Sword!"

This is a domain technique created by the Yongyuan Holy Son, and it is the most powerful domain technique.

Of course, the so-called self-creation is also borrowed from countless domain techniques, and the self-creation is successful, and there are traces of imitation.

This domain technique can be called a top-notch domain technique, much more powerful than ordinary domain techniques, so it is his strongest attack.

With this blow, he wanted to destroy Ye Tian.

"It seems that we have to perform the Holy Technique!" Ye Tian muttered.

In fact, he also knew that if he didn't use the Holy Technique, he would have no way to compete with the Yongyuan Holy Son, and now with just a few moves, he was injured a lot, and there was no way to resist the Yongyuan Holy Son's Yongyuan Holy Son.

Just as the Yongyuan Holy Sword slashed, a set of incomparably gorgeous armor appeared on Ye Tian's body.

While!!!

The Yongyuan Holy Sword collapsed.

Ye Tian was unscathed.

"You violated the rules by using the secret treasure!"

Yongyuan Holy Son subconsciously shouted.

"This is not a secret treasure, but a holy technique—a holy armor!" the voice of the Fire Emblem Battle Ancestor came.

Holy Skill: Holy Armor!

Many Domain Ancestors recognized it, because this was a relatively common holy technique in the Dark Sanctuary.

The Yongyuan Holy Son also reacted at this time, this is indeed not a secret treasure, but a holy armor formed by a holy technique.

It's just that he was too surprised just now, so he said so.

However, how could Ye Tian cultivate into a holy technique?

Moreover, this is still a Dacheng-level holy skill!

"Where the hell did he come from?"

Countless eyes looked at the Fire Emblem Battle Ancestor.

Because among their intelligence, Ye Tian came from the small realm.

But now, they suspected that Ye Tian was the heir of a certain Supreme Domain Ancestor of the Battle Gate, and he deliberately hid it like this.

At this time.

Fire Emblem Zhan Ancestor was also very puzzled, because he really didn't know that Ye Tian had practiced the Holy Technique, and Ye Tian hadn't told anyone in the Battle Sect about it, so it was exposed.

Abrupt.

The Fire Pattern Battle Ancestor thought that Ye Tian had asked for the Eight Saint Techniques, could it be ......

"Impossible, it's good that the Holy Son of Ten Thousand Laws can practice a holy technique, and those eight holy techniques belong to different types, no one can practice eight holy techniques, even if our Supreme Domain Ancestor can ignore the holy endowment and practice a holy technique, it will take a long time to cultivate a holy technique to the realm of Dacheng or above. "

Fire Emblem Zhan Zu thought to himself.

"Fire Pattern Battle Ancestor, whose descendant is that Ten Thousand Laws Holy Son of your Battle Gate, why can't we guess at all?"

"Fire Emblem War Ancestor, your battle gate is so deeply hidden, although the strength of the two holy sons hidden before is good, but they are still inferior to the Yongyuan Holy Son, I didn't expect that the Ten Thousand Laws Holy Son who did not hide his identity was the real demon, and he turned out to be the Holy Gift. This method is too clever, but why bother to hide it so deeply, we can still attack him?"

"Fire Emblem War Ancestor, tell me, which old friend's heir?"

......

Facing the inquiries of a Supreme Domain Ancestor level, the Fire Pattern Battle Ancestor said in a deep voice, "If I say I don't know, do you believe it?"

"Fire Emblem Battle Ancestor, if it's still secret at this time, then it's not interesting!"

A Supreme Domain Ancestor said coldly.

However, no matter how they asked, there was only one answer from the Fire Emblem War Ancestor - I don't know!

Actually, he really didn't know!

In the ring.

Ye Tian used the Holy Technique Holy Armor, his defense was invincible, almost unbreakable, no matter how the Yongyuan Holy Son attacked him, he couldn't beat his defense, so he couldn't hurt him.

And although Ye Tian's attack was not very powerful, it could hurt the Yongyuan Holy Son.

Moreover, although the holy skill of the Holy Armor defends against the Holy Armor, it can also weakly increase the attack power.

Therefore, after a while, the Yongyuan Holy Son was still defeated!

At this time, the six great saints looked at Ye Tian one after another, listing Ye Tian as one of their competitors.

Of course, they are not very jealous.

Because the defensive saints are suitable for being meat shields, and when they fight, they are not their opponents.

At this time.

Ye Tian defeated the Yongyuan Holy Son and temporarily ranked seventh, while the Yongyuan Holy Son fell to the eighth place.

Wow!

Ye Tian glanced at the Shenhe Holy Son of the Battle Gate.

At this time, the Holy Son of Kamigawa did not dare to look directly at Ye Tian's gaze.

Deep down, he was terrified.

Ye Tian has an eternal immortal holy body, and he has also practiced the holy technique, which is too demonic!

He has offended such a demon, how will he mix in the battle gate in the future?

Although he had a master at the level of the strongest domain ancestor, that master would not dare to offend a demon like Ye Tian!

As time passed, the challenge continued.

One genius after another challenged, and the ranking gradually stabilized.

And not long after, the first few people challenged.

The light-clothed Saint Son challenged the first place Zilin Saint Son.

These two holy endowments, who is strong and who is weak, people are very curious!
